mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.quiz_id) AS totalQuizCnt, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mqr.is_correct = TRUE THEN mqr.quiz_id END) AS correctQuizCnt, MAX(pq.description) AS description, p.first_image AS imageUrl FROM visit v JOIN member m ON m.member_id = v.member_id JOIN place p ON p.place_id = v.place_id AND p.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_id = p.place_id AND pq.difficulty = m.difficulty JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN member_quiz_response mqr ON mqr.member_id = v.member_id AND mqr.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id WHERE v.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_name, p.first_image ORDER BY p.place_id

SELECT p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.first_image AS imageUrl FROM member m JOIN place p ON p.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_id = p.place_id AND pq.difficulty = m.difficulty JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM visit v WHERE v.member_id = #{memberId} AND v.place_id = p.place_id ) GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_name, p.first_image ORDER BY p.place_id
